controls.control_objective: To ensure be called the reserve bank of india (commercial banks - interest rates on advances) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks -
Interest Rates on Advances) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be called the reserve bank of india (commercial banks - interest rates on advances) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to commercial banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank') for the purpose of these directions
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be applicable to Commercial Banks (hereinafter collectively
referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank')
For the purpose of these Directions, 'Commercial Banks' mean banking companies
(other than Small Finance Banks, Payment Banks, and Local Area Banks),
corresponding new banks, and the State Bank of India, as defined respectively under
clauses (c), (da) and (nc) of Section 5 of the Banking Regulation Act,1949.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to commercial banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank') for the purpose of these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to operations of foreign branches of indian banks
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall not be applicable to operations of foreign branches of Indian
banks.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to operations of foreign branches of indian banks

controls.control_objective: To ensure bear the meanings assigned to them below: (1) 'advance against own deposit' means advance granted against rupee/ fcnr(b) term deposit and the deposit
controls.control_description:
In these Directions, unless the context otherwise requires, the terms herein shall
bear the meanings assigned to them below:
(1) 'Advance against own deposit' means advance granted against Rupee/
FCNR(B) term deposit and the deposit stands in the name of:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to bear the meanings assigned to them below: (1) 'advance against own deposit' means advance granted against rupee/ fcnr(b) term deposit and the deposit

controls.control_objective: To ensure internal benchmark rate used to determine the interest rates on advances / loans sanctioned upto june 30, 2010
controls.control_description:
(2) 'Benchmark Prime Lending Rate (BPLR)' means internal benchmark rate used to
determine the interest rates on advances / loans sanctioned upto June 30, 2010.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to internal benchmark rate used to determine the interest rates on advances / loans sanctioned upto june 30, 2010

controls.control_objective: To ensure the reference rate used to determine the interest rates on loans
controls.control_description:
<image>
(3) 'Benchmark rate' means the reference rate used to determine the interest rates
on loans.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to the reference rate used to determine the interest rates on loans

controls.control_objective: To ensure the reference rate which includes:
controls.control_description: (4) 'External benchmark rate' means the reference rate which includes:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to the reference rate which includes:

controls.control_objective: To ensure a loan on which the interest rate is fixed for the entire tenor of the loan
controls.control_description:
(5) 'Fixed rate loan' means a loan on which the interest rate is fixed for the entire tenor
of the loan.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a loan on which the interest rate is fixed for the entire tenor of the loan

controls.control_objective: To ensure a loan on which interest rate does not remain fixed during the tenor of the loan
controls.control_description:
(6) 'Floating rate loan' means a loan on which interest rate does not remain fixed
during the tenor of the loan.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a loan on which interest rate does not remain fixed during the tenor of the loan

controls.control_objective: To ensure a reference rate determined internally by the bank
controls.control_description:
(7) 'Internal benchmark rate' means a reference rate determined internally by the
bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a reference rate determined internally by the bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as assigned in reserve bank of india (commercial banks - credit facilities) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
(8) 'Microfinance loan' shall have the same meaning as assigned in Reserve Bank of
India (Commercial Banks - Credit Facilities) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as assigned in reserve bank of india (commercial banks - credit facilities) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure borrowing of tenor up to but less than one year
controls.control_description: (10) 'Short term borrowing' means borrowing of tenor up to but less than one year.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to borrowing of tenor up to but less than one year

controls.control_objective: To ensure a loan which is repayable after a specified term period
controls.control_description: (11) 'Term loan' means a loan which is repayable after a specified term period.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a loan which is repayable after a specified term period

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as have been assigned to them under the banking regulation act,1949 or the reserve bank of india act, 1934 or any statutory modi
controls.control_description:
(12) All other expressions, unless defined herein, shall have the same meaning as
have been assigned to them under the Banking Regulation Act,1949 or the Reserve
Bank of India Act, 1934 or any statutory modification or re-enactment thereto or as
used in commercial parlance, as the case may be.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as have been assigned to them under the banking regulation act,1949 or the reserve bank of india act, 1934 or any statutory modi

controls.control_objective: To ensure charge interest on its loans and advances on the terms and conditions specified in these directions
controls.control_description:
A bank shall charge interest on its loans and advances on the terms and conditions
specified in these directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to charge interest on its loans and advances on the terms and conditions specified in these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure be a comprehensive policy duly approved by the board of directors or any committee of the board to which powers have been delegated, in respect of int
controls.control_description:
(1) There shall be a comprehensive policy duly approved by the Board of Directors or
any committee of the Board to which powers have been delegated, in respect of
interest rates on advances, including the pricing of microfinance loans.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be a comprehensive policy duly approved by the board of directors or any committee of the board to which powers have been delegated, in respect of int

controls.control_objective: To ensure be priced with reference to a benchmark as mentioned in paragraphs 10 to 27
controls.control_description:
(2) All floating rate loans, except those mentioned in paragraph 45, shall be priced
with reference to a benchmark as mentioned in paragraphs 10 to 27.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be priced with reference to a benchmark as mentioned in paragraphs 10 to 27

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the freedom to offer all categories of advances on fixed or floating interest rates
controls.control_description:
(3) A bank shall have the freedom to offer all categories of advances on fixed or
floating interest rates.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the freedom to offer all categories of advances on fixed or floating interest rates

controls.control_objective: To ensure determine its actual lending rates by adding the components of spread to the reference benchmark rate
controls.control_description:
(4) When the floating rate advances are linked to a reference benchmark rate, a bank
shall determine its actual lending rates by adding the components of spread to the
reference benchmark rate.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to determine its actual lending rates by adding the components of spread to the reference benchmark rate

controls.control_objective: To ensure form part of the terms of the loan contract
controls.control_description:
(5) The reference benchmark rate used for pricing the loans shall form part of the
terms of the loan contract.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to form part of the terms of the loan contract

controls.control_objective: To ensure be less than the benchmark rate for similar tenor and shall be as per directions contained in paragraph 45(4)(v)
controls.control_description:
(6) Interest rates on fixed rate loans of tenor below three years shall not be less than
the benchmark rate for similar tenor and shall be as per directions contained in
paragraph 45(4)(v).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be less than the benchmark rate for similar tenor and shall be as per directions contained in paragraph 45(4)(v)

controls.control_objective: To ensure be charged on all advances at monthly rests
controls.control_description: (7) Interest shall be charged on all advances at monthly rests.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be charged on all advances at monthly rests

controls.control_objective: To ensure be charged by a bank as per below instructions:
controls.control_description:
Provided that interest on agricultural advances and advance to farmers shall be
charged by a bank as per below instructions:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be charged by a bank as per below instructions:

controls.control_objective: To ensure exceed the principal amount for advances to small and marginal farmers
controls.control_description:
(i) Total interest debited in short term loan should not exceed the principal amount
for advances to small and marginal farmers.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to exceed the principal amount for advances to small and marginal farmers

controls.control_objective: To ensure charge interest on agricultural advances at annual rests for long duration crop only
controls.control_description:
(ii) A bank may charge interest on agricultural advances at annual rests for long
duration crop only.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to charge interest on agricultural advances at annual rests for long duration crop only

controls.control_objective: To ensure take into consideration due date/s fixed on the basis of fluidity with borrowers and harvesting / marketing season while charging interest and compoun
controls.control_description:
(iii) As regards other agricultural advances in respect of short duration crops and
allied activities, a bank may take into consideration due date/s fixed on the basis
of fluidity with borrowers and harvesting / marketing season while charging
interest and compound the same if the loan / instalment becomes overdue.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to take into consideration due date/s fixed on the basis of fluidity with borrowers and harvesting / marketing season while charging interest and compoun

controls.control_objective: To ensure be rounded off to the nearest rupee
controls.control_description: (8) Interest chargeable on rupee advances shall be rounded off to the nearest rupee.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be rounded off to the nearest rupee

controls.control_objective: To ensure be justifiable having regard to the total cost incurred by the bank in extending the loan and the extent of return that could be reasonably expected f
controls.control_description:
<image>
(9) Interest charged on small value loans, particularly, personal loans and such other
loans of similar nature shall be justifiable having regard to the total cost incurred by
the bank in extending the loan and the extent of return that could be reasonably
expected from the transaction.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be justifiable having regard to the total cost incurred by the bank in extending the loan and the extent of return that could be reasonably expected f

controls.control_objective: To ensure be on mutually agreed terms of contract
controls.control_description:
(10) In case of takeover of bank branches in rural and semi urban centres from one
bank to another bank, transfer of borrowal accounts of the existing branch to the
branch of acquiring bank shall be on mutually agreed terms of contract.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be on mutually agreed terms of contract

controls.control_objective: To ensure be put into any disadvantage and shall have the option of continuing with the existing bank or the acquiring bank
controls.control_description:
Provided that the existing borrowers shall not be put into any disadvantage and shall
have the option of continuing with the existing bank or the acquiring bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be put into any disadvantage and shall have the option of continuing with the existing bank or the acquiring bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure be no lending below the benchmark rate for a particular maturity for all loans linked to that benchmark
controls.control_description:
(11) There shall be no lending below the benchmark rate for a particular maturity for
all loans linked to that benchmark.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be no lending below the benchmark rate for a particular maturity for all loans linked to that benchmark

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be applicable to rupee advances granted against fcnr(b) deposits to a third party or out of resources mobilised under the fcnr(b) scheme
controls.control_description:
The directions contained in paragraph 6 above shall also be applicable to Rupee
advances granted against FCNR(B) deposits to a third party or out of resources
mobilised under the FCNR(B) scheme.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be applicable to rupee advances granted against fcnr(b) deposits to a third party or out of resources mobilised under the fcnr(b) scheme

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place a board-approved policy regarding pricing of microfinance loans which shall, inter alia, cover the following: (1) a well-documented inter
controls.control_description:
A bank shall put in place a Board-approved policy regarding pricing of microfinance
loans which shall, inter alia, cover the following:
(1) A well-documented interest rate model / approach for arriving at the all-inclusive
interest rate.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to put in place a board-approved policy regarding pricing of microfinance loans which shall, inter alia, cover the following: (1) a well-documented inter

controls.control_objective: To ensure be usurious
controls.control_description:
Interest rates and other charges / fees on microfinance loans should not be
usurious.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be usurious

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subjected to supervisory scrutiny by the reserve bank
controls.control_description: These shall be subjected to supervisory scrutiny by the Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be subjected to supervisory scrutiny by the reserve bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure be priced with reference to the base rate which will be the internal benchmark for such purposes
controls.control_description:
All floating rate rupee loans sanctioned and renewed between July 1, 2010 and
March 31, 2016 shall be priced with reference to the Base Rate which will be the
internal benchmark for such purposes.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be priced with reference to the base rate which will be the internal benchmark for such purposes

controls.control_objective: To ensure include all those elements of the lending rates that are common across all categories of borrowers
controls.control_description:
Base Rate shall include all those elements of the lending rates that are common
across all categories of borrowers.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include all those elements of the lending rates that are common across all categories of borrowers

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the freedom to calculate cost of funds either on the basis of average cost of funds or on marginal cost of funds or any other methodology in vogue, which is reasonable and transparent
controls.control_description:
A bank shall have the freedom to calculate cost of funds either on the basis of
average cost of funds or on marginal cost of funds or any other methodology in vogue,
which is reasonable and transparent, subject to it being consistent and made available
for supervisory review / scrutiny as and when required.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the freedom to calculate cost of funds either on the basis of average cost of funds or on marginal cost of funds or any other methodology in vogue, which is reasonable and transparent

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the largest share in the deposit base of the bank
controls.control_description:
Provided that where the card rate for deposits of one or more tenor is the basis, the
deposits in the chosen tenor/s shall have the largest share in the deposit base of the
bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the largest share in the deposit base of the bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure review the base rate at least once in a quarter with the approval of the board or the asset liability management committees (alcos) as per the bank's
controls.control_description:
A bank shall review the Base Rate at least once in a quarter with the approval of
the Board or the Asset Liability Management Committees (ALCOs) as per the bank's
practice.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to review the base rate at least once in a quarter with the approval of the board or the asset liability management committees (alcos) as per the bank's

controls.control_objective: To ensure be priced with reference to the marginal cost of funds based lending rate (mclr) which will be the internal benchmark for such purposes subject to the
controls.control_description:
April 1, 2016 shall be
priced with reference to the Marginal Cost of Funds based Lending Rate (MCLR) which
will be the internal benchmark for such purposes subject to the provisions contained
in paragraphs 25 to 27.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be priced with reference to the marginal cost of funds based lending rate (mclr) which will be the internal benchmark for such purposes subject to the

controls.control_objective: To ensure comprise of: (1) marginal cost of funds
controls.control_description:
The MCLR shall comprise of:
(1) Marginal cost of funds;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to comprise of: (1) marginal cost of funds

controls.control_objective: To ensure comprise of marginal cost of borrowings and return on networth
controls.control_description:
The marginal cost of funds shall comprise of Marginal cost of borrowings and
return on networth.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to comprise of marginal cost of borrowings and return on networth

controls.control_objective: To ensure be used for arriving at negative carry on crr
controls.control_description:
Negative carry on the mandatory CRR which arises due to return on CRR
balances being nil, will be calculated as under:
Required CRR x (marginal cost) / (1- CRR)
The marginal cost of funds arrived at paragraph 17 above shall be used for arriving at
negative carry on CRR.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be used for arriving at negative carry on crr

controls.control_objective: To ensure be included under this head
controls.control_description:
All operating costs associated with providing the loan product including cost of
raising funds shall be included under this head.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be included under this head

controls.control_objective: To ensure be ensured that the costs of providing those services which are separately recovered by way of service charges do not form part of this component
controls.control_description:
It shall be ensured that the costs of
providing those services which are separately recovered by way of service charges do
not form part of this component.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be ensured that the costs of providing those services which are separately recovered by way of service charges do not form part of this component

controls.control_objective: To ensure calculate all operating costs as a percentage of marginal cost of funds for computing mclr
controls.control_description:
A bank shall calculate all operating costs as a percentage of marginal cost of funds
for computing MCLR.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to calculate all operating costs as a percentage of marginal cost of funds for computing mclr

controls.control_objective: To ensure be borrower specific or loan class specific
controls.control_description:
The change in tenor
premium should not be borrower specific or loan class specific.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be borrower specific or loan class specific

controls.control_objective: To ensure correspond to the following: (1) the tenor of the funds in the single largest maturity bucket
controls.control_description:
The tenor of the MCLR calculated as per the Annex shall correspond to the
following:
(1) the tenor of the funds in the single largest maturity bucket, provided it is more than
30 percent of the entire funds (other than equity) reckoned for determining the MCLR,
or
(2) the weighted average tenor of two or more maturity buckets that together account
for more than 30 percent, if no single maturity bucket accounts for more than 30
<image>
percent of the funds.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to correspond to the following: (1) the tenor of the funds in the single largest maturity bucket

controls.control_objective: To ensure be arrived at by calculating the cumulative weightage based on the descending order of the maturity time buckets
controls.control_description:
The maturity bucket shall be arrived at by calculating the
cumulative weightage based on the descending order of the maturity time buckets.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be arrived at by calculating the cumulative weightage based on the descending order of the maturity time buckets

controls.control_objective: To ensure correspond to the weighted average of tenor of the first three time buckets
controls.control_description:
Original Maturity
(other than equity)
(in percent)
1 5 years & above 15.1 15.1
2 3 years & above but less than 5 years 11.8 26.9
3 2 years & above but less than 3 years 9.3 36.2
4 1 year & above but less than 2 years 16.9 53.1
5 6 months & above but less than 1 year 24.3 77.4
6 91 days & above but less than 6 months 10.5 87.9
7 Up to 90 days 12.1 100
Total 100
For above-mentioned maturity profile of borrowings, the MCLR shall correspond to the
weighted average of tenor of the first three time buckets.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to correspond to the weighted average of tenor of the first three time buckets

controls.control_objective: To ensure arrive at the mclr of various maturities by incorporating the corresponding tenor premium / discount to the sum of marginal cost of funds, negative ca
controls.control_description:
Since MCLR will be a tenor linked benchmark, a bank shall arrive at the MCLR of
various maturities by incorporating the corresponding tenor premium / discount to the
sum of Marginal cost of funds, Negative carry on account of CRR and Operating costs.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to arrive at the mclr of various maturities by incorporating the corresponding tenor premium / discount to the sum of marginal cost of funds, negative ca

controls.control_objective: To ensure publish the internal benchmark for the following maturities: (1) overnight mclr, (2) one-month mclr, (3) three-month mclr, (4) six month mclr, (5) one
controls.control_description:
Accordingly, a bank shall publish the internal benchmark for the following maturities:
(1) overnight MCLR,
(2) one-month MCLR,
(3) three-month MCLR,
(4) six month MCLR,
(5) One year MCLR.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to publish the internal benchmark for the following maturities: (1) overnight mclr, (2) one-month mclr, (3) three-month mclr, (4) six month mclr, (5) one

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the option of publishing mclr of any other longer maturity
controls.control_description:
In addition to the above, a bank shall have the option of publishing MCLR of any other
longer maturity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the option of publishing mclr of any other longer maturity

controls.control_objective: To ensure review and publish its mclr of different maturities every month on a pre-announced date with the approval of the board or any other committee to which
controls.control_description:
A bank shall review and publish its MCLR of different maturities every month on a
pre-announced date with the approval of the Board or any other committee to which
powers have been delegated.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to review and publish its mclr of different maturities every month on a pre-announced date with the approval of the board or any other committee to which

controls.control_objective: To ensure be benchmarked to an external benchmark rate
controls.control_description:
All floating rate personal or retail loans (housing, auto, etc.), and floating rate loans
extended by banks to Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises (MSME) shall be
benchmarked to an External Benchmark Rate.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be benchmarked to an external benchmark rate

controls.control_objective: To ensure adopt a uniform external benchmark within a loan category
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to adopt a uniform external benchmark within a loan category

controls.control_objective: To ensure have a board approved policy delineating the components of spread charged to a customer
controls.control_description:
A bank shall have a Board approved policy delineating the components of spread
charged to a customer.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to have a board approved policy delineating the components of spread charged to a customer

controls.control_objective: To ensure include principles: (1) to determine the quantum of each component of spread
controls.control_description:
The policy shall include principles:
(1) To determine the quantum of each component of spread.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include principles: (1) to determine the quantum of each component of spread

controls.control_objective: To ensure be increased except on account of deterioration in the credit risk profile of the customer or change in tenor premium
controls.control_description:
In addition to the conditions laid down in paragraph 28 of these Directions, a bank
shall adhere to the following conditions:
(1) The credit risk premium charged to an existing borrower shall not be increased
except on account of deterioration in the credit risk profile of the customer or change
in tenor premium.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be increased except on account of deterioration in the credit risk profile of the customer or change in tenor premium

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to loans under consortium / multiple banking arrangements
controls.control_description:
Provided that the stipulation contained in paragraph 29(1) above shall not be
applicable to loans under consortium / multiple banking arrangements.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to loans under consortium / multiple banking arrangements

controls.control_objective: To ensure be borrower specific or loan class specific
controls.control_description:
(2) The change in tenor premium on loans sanctioned under Base rate system shall
not be borrower specific or loan class specific.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be borrower specific or loan class specific

controls.control_objective: To ensure be uniform for all types of loans for a given residual tenor
controls.control_description:
In other words, the change in tenor
premium shall be uniform for all types of loans for a given residual tenor.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be uniform for all types of loans for a given residual tenor

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply to loans granted under bplr system, which continue till date
controls.control_description:
Provided that the spread guidelines mentioned above shall not apply to loans granted
under BPLR system, which continue till date.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply to loans granted under bplr system, which continue till date

controls.control_objective: To ensure be covered under the terms of the loan agreements
controls.control_description:
Such loans shall be covered under the
terms of the loan agreements.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be covered under the terms of the loan agreements

controls.control_objective: To ensure adopt the following broad components of spread: (1) business strategy the component shall be arrived at taking into consideration the business strateg
controls.control_description:
In addition to the conditions laid down in paragraph 28 of these Directions, a bank
shall adopt the following broad components of spread:
(1) Business strategy
The component shall be arrived at taking into consideration the business strategy,
market competition, embedded options in the loan product, market liquidity of the loan
etc.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to adopt the following broad components of spread: (1) business strategy the component shall be arrived at taking into consideration the business strateg

controls.control_objective: To ensure be arrived at based on an appropriate credit risk rating / scoring model and after taking into consideration customer relationship, expected losses, c
controls.control_description:
(2) Credit risk premium
The credit risk premium charged to the customer representing the default risk arising
<image>
from loan sanctioned shall be arrived at based on an appropriate credit risk rating /
scoring model and after taking into consideration customer relationship, expected
losses, collaterals, etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be arrived at based on an appropriate credit risk rating / scoring model and after taking into consideration customer relationship, expected losses, c

controls.control_objective: To ensure be increased except on account of deterioration in the credit risk profile of the customer
controls.control_description:
The spread charged to an existing borrower shall not be increased except on
account of deterioration in the credit risk profile of the customer.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be increased except on account of deterioration in the credit risk profile of the customer

controls.control_objective: To ensure be supported by a full-fledged risk profile review of the customer
controls.control_description:
Any such decision
regarding change in spread on account of change in credit risk profile shall be
supported by a full-fledged risk profile review of the customer.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be supported by a full-fledged risk profile review of the customer

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to loans under consortium / multiple banking arrangements
controls.control_description:
Provided that the stipulation contained in paragraph 31 above shall not be applicable
to loans under consortium / multiple banking arrangements.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to loans under consortium / multiple banking arrangements

controls.control_objective: To ensure have either a positive value or be zero
controls.control_description:
business strategy and Credit risk premium shall
have either a positive value or be zero.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have either a positive value or be zero

controls.control_objective: To ensure undergo change only when borrower's credit assessment undergoes a substantial change, as agreed upon in the loan contract
controls.control_description:
However, credit
risk premium may undergo change only when borrower's credit assessment
undergoes a substantial change, as agreed upon in the loan contract.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to undergo change only when borrower's credit assessment undergoes a substantial change, as agreed upon in the loan contract

controls.control_objective: To ensure the other spread components may be reduced by banks for a loan category earlier than three years for customer retention, on justifiable grounds, in a
controls.control_description:
Provided that the other spread components may be reduced by banks for a loan
category earlier than three years for customer retention, on justifiable grounds, in a
non-discriminatory manner, and in terms of the bank's policy.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to the other spread components may be reduced by banks for a loan category earlier than three years for customer retention, on justifiable grounds, in a

controls.control_objective: To ensure , at its option, specify interest reset dates on its floating rate loans
controls.control_description: A bank shall, at its option, specify interest reset dates on its floating rate loans.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , at its option, specify interest reset dates on its floating rate loans

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the option to offer loans with reset dates linked either to the date of first disbursement of the loan / credit limits or to the date of review o
controls.control_description:
A
bank shall have the option to offer loans with reset dates linked either to the date of
first disbursement of the loan / credit limits or to the date of review of MCLR.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the option to offer loans with reset dates linked either to the date of first disbursement of the loan / credit limits or to the date of review o

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable till the next reset date, irrespective of the changes in the benchmark during the interim
controls.control_description:
The MCLR prevailing on the date of first disbursement, whether partial or full, shall
be applicable till the next reset date, irrespective of the changes in the benchmark
during the interim.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable till the next reset date, irrespective of the changes in the benchmark during the interim

controls.control_objective: To ensure be determined accordingly
controls.control_description: Future reset dates shall be determined accordingly.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be determined accordingly

controls.control_objective: To ensure be one year or lower
controls.control_description: The periodicity of reset shall be one year or lower.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be one year or lower

controls.control_objective: To ensure form part of the terms of the loan contract
controls.control_description:
The exact periodicity of reset
shall form part of the terms of the loan contract.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to form part of the terms of the loan contract

controls.control_objective: To ensure correspond to the tenor / maturity of the mclr to which the loan is linked
controls.control_description:
The periodicity of the reset under MCLR shall correspond to the tenor / maturity of
the MCLR to which the loan is linked.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to correspond to the tenor / maturity of the mclr to which the loan is linked

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reset at least once in three months
controls.control_description:
The interest rate under external benchmark shall be reset at least once in three
months.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reset at least once in three months

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to review and publish base rate as hitherto
controls.control_description: A bank shall continue to review and publish Base Rate as hitherto.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to review and publish base rate as hitherto

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue till repayment or renewal, as the case may be
controls.control_description:
Existing loans and credit limits linked to the Base Rate / BPLR shall continue till
repayment or renewal, as the case may be.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue till repayment or renewal, as the case may be

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the option to move to the mclr linked loan at mutually acceptable terms
controls.control_description:
Provided that existing borrowers shall have the option to move to the MCLR linked
loan at mutually acceptable terms.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the option to move to the mclr linked loan at mutually acceptable terms

controls.control_objective: To ensure be treated as a foreclosure of existing facility
controls.control_description: Provided that the switch-over shall not be treated as a foreclosure of existing facility.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be treated as a foreclosure of existing facility

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue till repayment or renewal, as the case may be
controls.control_description:
Existing loans and credit limits linked to the MCLR / Base Rate / BPLR shall
continue till repayment or renewal, as the case may be.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue till repayment or renewal, as the case may be

controls.control_objective: To ensure be eligible for switchover to external benchmark without any charges / fees
controls.control_description:
Provided that floating rate term loans sanctioned to borrowers who, in terms of extant
guidelines, are eligible to prepay a floating rate loan without pre-payment charges,
shall be eligible for switchover to External Benchmark without any charges / fees,
except reasonable administrative / legal costs.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be eligible for switchover to external benchmark without any charges / fees

controls.control_objective: To ensure be same as the rate charged for a new loan of the same category, type, tenor and amount, at the time of origination of the loan
controls.control_description:
The final rate charged to this category
of borrowers, post switchover to external benchmark, shall be same as the rate
charged for a new loan of the same category, type, tenor and amount, at the time of
origination of the loan.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be same as the rate charged for a new loan of the same category, type, tenor and amount, at the time of origination of the loan

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the option to move to external benchmark at mutually acceptable terms
controls.control_description:
Provided that other existing borrowers shall have the option to move to External
Benchmark at mutually acceptable terms.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the option to move to external benchmark at mutually acceptable terms

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the freedom to determine the interest rates on advances in foreign currency as per the comprehensive policy on interest rates on advances duly ap
controls.control_description:
A bank shall have the freedom to determine the interest rates on advances in
foreign currency as per the comprehensive policy on interest rates on advances duly
approved by the Board of Directors or any committee of the Board to which powers
have been delegated.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to have the freedom to determine the interest rates on advances in foreign currency as per the comprehensive policy on interest rates on advances duly ap

controls.control_objective: To ensure be determined with reference to a market determined external benchmark
controls.control_description:
The interest rates shall be determined with reference to a market determined
external benchmark.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be determined with reference to a market determined external benchmark

controls.control_objective: To ensure be determined by adding the components of spread to the external benchmark
controls.control_description:
The actual lending rates shall be determined by adding the components of spread
to the external benchmark.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be determined by adding the components of spread to the external benchmark

controls.control_objective: To ensure be exempted from the provisions contained under paragraphs 10 to 41 of these directions: (1) loans covered by schemes specially formulated by governme
controls.control_description:
The following types of loans shall be exempted from the provisions contained
under paragraphs 10 to 41 of these Directions:
(1) Loans covered by schemes specially formulated by Government of India wherein
a bank has to charge interest rates as per the scheme.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be exempted from the provisions contained under paragraphs 10 to 41 of these directions: (1) loans covered by schemes specially formulated by governme

controls.control_objective: To ensure adhere to the base rate / mclr / external benchmark guidelines
controls.control_description:
(3) Loans granted under various refinance schemes formulated by Government of
India or any Government Undertakings wherein a bank charges interest at the rates
prescribed under the schemes to the extent refinance is available, Interest rate
charged on the part not covered under refinance shall adhere to the Base rate / MCLR
/ External Benchmark guidelines.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to adhere to the base rate / mclr / external benchmark guidelines

controls.control_objective: To ensure be equal to or above the base rate at the time of sanction or renewal
controls.control_description:
Provided that floating rate loans based on external benchmark sanctioned before
April 01, 2016 shall be equal to or above the Base Rate at the time of sanction or
renewal.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be equal to or above the base rate at the time of sanction or renewal

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to relevant floating interest rate instructions as contained in these directions
controls.control_description:
Provided that in case of hybrid loans where the interest rates are partly fixed and
partly floating, interest rate on the floating portion shall be subject to relevant
floating interest rate instructions as contained in these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be subject to relevant floating interest rate instructions as contained in these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure be less than the sum of following:
controls.control_description:
Provided further that interest rates for fixed rate loans (including fixed rate portion
of hybrid loans) of tenor up to three years (except interest rates on bill discounting
and factoring facilities) shall not be less than the sum of following:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be less than the sum of following:

controls.control_objective: To ensure be below the base rate at the time of sanction or renewal
controls.control_description:
<image>
Provided further that fixed rate loans sanctioned before April 01, 2016 shall not be
below the Base Rate at the time of sanction or renewal.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be below the base rate at the time of sanction or renewal

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to remain repealed
controls.control_description:
The Directions, instructions and guidelines
repealed prior to the issuance of these Directions shall continue to remain repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to remain repealed

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to be governed by the provisions thereof
controls.control_description:
Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been taken,
or initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall continue to
be governed by the provisions thereof.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to be governed by the provisions thereof

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed as governed by these directions
controls.control_description:
All approvals or acknowledgments granted
under these repealed lists shall be deemed as governed by these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed as governed by these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder
controls.control_description:
Further,
the repeal of these directions, instructions, or guidelines shall not in any way
prejudicially affect:
(1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder

controls.control_objective: To ensure be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline
controls.control_description:
and
any such investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may be instituted,
continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be
imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guidelines had not been
repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force
controls.control_description:
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation of
the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in
force.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force

controls.control_objective: To ensure be final and binding
controls.control_description:
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order to
remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of these
Directions, the RBI may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary clarifications in
<image>
respect of any matter covered herein and the interpretation of any provision of these
Directions given by the RBI shall be final and binding.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be final and binding

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reckoned for arriving at the balance outstanding
controls.control_description:
Annex
(see paragraph 15 to 24)
Sl Source of funds
Rates offered
Balance outstanding
Marginal
Remarks
(excluding
cost (1)x(2)
equity)
on deposits
as a percentage of total funds
on the date of review /
(other than
equity)
rates at
(2) (See note
which
funds raised
below)
(1)
A Marginal Cost of Borrowings
1 Deposits
a Current Deposits


The core portion of current deposits identified based on the Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks
- Asset Liability Management) Directions, 2025 should be reckoned for arriving at the balance outstanding.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reckoned for arriving at the balance outstanding

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reckoned for arriving at the balance outstanding
controls.control_description:
b Savings
The core portion of savings deposits identified based on the Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks
- Asset Liability Management) Directions, 2025 should be reckoned for arriving at the balance outstanding.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reckoned for arriving at the balance outstanding

controls.control_objective: To ensure be included
controls.control_description:
c Term deposits (Fixed Rate)
Deposits
Term deposits of various maturities including those on which differential interest rates are payable should be included.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be included

controls.control_objective: To ensure be arrived at based on the prevailing external benchmark rate on the date of review
controls.control_description:
d Term deposits (Floating Rate)
The rate should be arrived at based on the prevailing external benchmark rate on the date of review.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be arrived at based on the prevailing external benchmark rate on the date of review

controls.control_objective: To ensure be included in computing marginal cost of funds
controls.control_description:
e Foreign currency
Foreign currency deposits, to the extent deployed for lending in rupees, should be included in computing marginal cost of funds.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be included in computing marginal cost of funds

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reckoned for computing marginal cost
controls.control_description:
The swap cost and hedge
deposits
<image>
cost of such deposits should be reckoned for computing marginal cost.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reckoned for computing marginal cost

controls.control_objective: To ensure be included in computing marginal cost of funds
controls.control_description:
c Foreign
Borrowings
Foreign currency borrowings, to the extent deployed for lending in rupees, should be included in computing marginal cost of funds.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be included in computing marginal cost of funds

controls.control_objective: To ensure have a weightage of 92 percent of marginal cost of funds while return on networth will have the balance weightage of 8 percent
controls.control_description:
Marginal cost of
Currency Borrowings including HO borrowings by foreign banks (other than those forming part of Tier-I capital)
The marginal cost of borrowings shall have a weightage of 92 percent of Marginal Cost of Funds while return on networth will have the balance weightage of 8 percent.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have a weightage of 92 percent of marginal cost of funds while return on networth will have the balance weightage of 8 percent

controls.control_objective: To ensure be included for computing marginal cost of funds
controls.control_description:
B Return on networth
borrowings
Amount of common equity Tier 1 capital required to be maintained for Risk Weighted Assets as per extant capital adequacy norms shall be included for computing marginal cost of funds.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be included for computing marginal cost of funds

controls.control_objective: To ensure be higher, i
controls.control_description: In case of newly set up banks (either domestic or foreign banks operating as branches in India) where lending operations are mainly financed by capital, the weightage for this component may be higher, i.e., in proportion to the extent of capital deployed for lending.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be higher, i

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the option to reckon the outstanding balances of deposits and other borrowings as on any day, not more than seven calendar days, prior to the dat
controls.control_description:
Marginal cost of funds = 92 percent x Marginal cost of borrowings + 8 percent x
Return on networth
Note: A bank shall have the option to reckon the outstanding balances of deposits and
other borrowings as on any day, not more than seven calendar days, prior to the date
from which the MCLR becomes effective.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the option to reckon the outstanding balances of deposits and other borrowings as on any day, not more than seven calendar days, prior to the dat

controls.control_objective: To ensure be maintained consistently for a period not less one year
controls.control_description:
The chosen time lag shall be maintained
consistently for a period not less one year.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be maintained consistently for a period not less one year
